channel.title: Posts on Pushpak Prabhat | Animation & Interactive Technology
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Pushpak Prabhat | Animation & Interactive Technology

item.title: Why Motion Design is the Future of Brand Communication
item.description: In an era of shrinking attention spans, motion design has become the most powerful tool for brand storytelling. Here’s why every brand needs to invest in motion.

item.title: From Animator to Tech: My Journey into Interactive Technology
item.description: How I transitioned from traditional animation to interactive technology and why I believe the two fields are converging faster than ever.

item.title: 5 Blender Tips That Changed My 3D Workflow
item.description: After years of working with Blender for 3D animation, these five tips completely transformed my productivity and output quality.
